name: Proton VPN
tagline: Swiss-based, open-source, with a genuinely usable free tier.

logging.summary: No-logs policy independently verified by five consecutive Securitum audits, including physical inspection of live servers in Zürich (Aug 2025).

transparency.realWorldNoLog: Across 411 legal requests (2019-2025), Proton VPN disclosed zero VPN activity data: with no logs, it cannot identify who connected to a server, even under a binding Swiss order. Switzerland also sits outside the 5/9/14 Eyes with no VPN data-retention law.

bestFor: People who want a trustworthy free tier
notFor: Fully anonymous signup (an email or username is required)
pros: Open source, with five consecutive independent no-logs audits (Securitum, 2022-2026)
Court-tested: across 411 legal requests, zero VPN data was handed over
Unlimited free tier with no data cap; private payment by cash (mail) or Bitcoin
Stealth obfuscation protocol and Secure Core multi-hop
cons: Signup requires an email or username (not fully anonymous)
One company spanning many products is a broad attack surface
notes: Overseen by the non-profit Proton Foundation; the free tier is funded by paid subscriptions.

sources.label: Proton VPN no-logs audits (official, five consecutive)
Proton VPN transparency report (legal requests, zero data disclosed)
Proton VPN payment options, including cash by mail
